Metro Manila • Closed Beta
Home is who you trust. KasaM connects Metro Manila households with verified helpers — kilala mo na, bago pa pumasok.
CLEANING • COOKING • CHILDCARE • ELDER CARE • DRIVERS • NURSES

CLOSE TO
HOME

Walang agency. Walang hidden fees.

Ganito Kalinis.

Every helper on KasaM is ID-checked, interviewed, and reviewed by households like yours — hindi basta-basta.

Browse verified profiles, chat muna bago mag-book, and agree on terms you both sign. Deposits here are a promise, not a payment — no money moves through the app.
